scope: Fix every non-OK row in TODO.MD for the AgenC TUI rendering audit on local main.

approvedExceptions.reason: Allows the TypeScript unknown type only in existing audited files that already parse untrusted data. New pipeline helper files are intentionally excluded.
Allows the TypeScript Partial utility type in existing typed adapters only; lowercase partial domain text is handled by a separate narrower exception.
Placeholder is an active UI input prop/string in these audited components, not a marker for missing implementation. New helper/test files are excluded.
Skip/skipped is active control-flow, input-option, or render-optimization language in these existing audited files. It is not allowed in new pipeline files or unresolved-work notes.
Partial is a domain term for streaming text/tool deltas, row rendering, and compaction in these exact files, not a partial-implementation marker.
Blocked is a domain state for agent/gate rendering, not a deferred-work marker. The exception is limited to files that own status rendering or tests.

These goal-gate scripts intentionally contain enforcement prompts and verifier fixtures that name forbidden debt markers. The exception is file-scoped to the existing gate scripts and does not apply to new TUI runtime modules, UI tests, or the pipeline event helper.
The existing goal scripts expose and reject skip flags and skipped checklist states as gate-control behavior. This exception is limited to those scripts.
The existing goal verifier contains fixtures for partial compaction and related enforcement checks. This exception is limited to the gate scripts.
The existing goal scripts contain TypeScript fixture text and verifier strings with the unknown type/domain word. This exception is limited to the gate scripts.
The existing goal verifier contains enforcement fixtures that search for placeholder debt. This exception is limited to the gate scripts.
This test fixture asserts literal grep output containing TODO tokens; it is not a pending implementation marker.

requiredBehaviors: Clamp modal context rows and modal maxHeight to non-negative values on tiny terminals while preserving bottom chrome ownership.
edgeCases: terminalRows is 0, 1, 2, or exactly MODAL_TRANSCRIPT_PEEK and does not produce a negative modal viewport.

requiredBehaviors: Introduce an explicit AgenC unicode/ascii glyph mode and route fullscreen chrome through it instead of direct figure glyph use.
edgeCases: AGENC_TUI_GLYPHS=ascii forces ASCII arrows and pointers even when the terminal can render Unicode.
Unset or unicode mode preserves the existing Unicode glyphs.

requiredBehaviors: Surface slow render or dropped frame metrics in an operator-visible TUI status row when average FPS is below 20 or 1 percent low FPS is below 12.
edgeCases: Undefined metrics render nothing.
Healthy metrics render nothing.
Average FPS below 20 or 1 percent low FPS below 12 renders a bounded warning line without stealing focus.

requiredBehaviors: Keep the visible render error overview on screen after a caught React render error and still provide a terminal cleanup path.
edgeCases: A caught render error does not immediately call the exit handler before the error UI can paint.
Unmount after the error still restores cursor/raw-mode state through the existing teardown path.

requiredBehaviors: Remove the deprecated previous-output method from the active shutdown path and replace it with a current AgenC-named operation.
edgeCases: Main-screen unmount still preserves the last frame without calling a deprecated method name.

requiredBehaviors: Daemon disconnected or reconnecting notices include an allowlisted warning cause and render as visible warning system messages.
edgeCases: A connection warning with no cause is still suppressed by policy, while daemon connection warnings with the explicit cause render.
commands: cd runtime && npm test -- src/tui/parity/session-transcript.test.ts src/tui/daemon-session.contract.test.ts

requiredBehaviors: Out-of-order tool result events render recoverable visible fallback rows instead of being dropped when their tool start has not arrived yet.
edgeCases: Tool result before start is visible.
Duplicate later tool result is deduped by existing event identity handling.
In-order tool result still attaches to the open tool block.

requiredBehaviors: Tool input deltas that arrive before their start event are buffered and replayed when the corresponding start arrives.
edgeCases: Multiple deltas before start preserve order.
A delta for an unrelated index remains isolated from later tool starts.
Normal in-order delta handling is unchanged.

requiredBehaviors: Local-agent cancellation callbacks surface a visible notification with killed agent names or counts when cancellation data exists.
edgeCases: Empty killed-agent lists do not render noise.
Known agent labels are shown.
Agent labels absent fall back to a count without throwing.

requiredBehaviors: Non-error background agent status events render visible system rows for idle, starting, running, waiting-on-user, completing, cancelled, completed, and failed states.
edgeCases: Unrecognized statuses render as a generic status rather than disappearing.
Error statuses still use the existing error rendering path.
Repeated status events remain deduped by event identity.
commands: cd runtime && npm test -- src/tui/parity/session-transcript.test.ts src/tui/daemon-session.contract.test.ts

requiredBehaviors: Orphan user tool result messages render a visible recovery fallback row instead of returning null.
edgeCases: Missing matching tool use renders generic tool-result content.
Known error results continue to render the existing error component.
Known tool results keep the current tool-specific display.

requiredBehaviors: Prompt text input columns are clamped to a valid non-negative width on very narrow terminals.
edgeCases: columns less than 3 produces 0 input columns.
normal terminal widths preserve existing width calculation.

requiredBehaviors: Paste line threshold is clamped so tiny terminal height does not force every paste into reference mode.
edgeCases: rows below 10 use a zero-or-positive threshold.
normal rows preserve the current two-line threshold cap.

requiredBehaviors: Unsupported review-artifact and workflow permission feature paths fail gracefully through fallback permission UI instead of throwing during render.
edgeCases: Review-artifact permission request returns fallback content when enabled.
Workflow permission request returns fallback content when enabled.
Normal supported permission renderers are unchanged.

requiredBehaviors: Provider manager OAuth labels render AgenC-owned or provider-protocol labels instead of donor-branded labels.
edgeCases: Logged-out OAuth state has no donor-branded visible text.
Configured OAuth state has no donor-branded visible text.
Real provider identifiers that product rules allow remain untouched.

requiredBehaviors: Manual MCP callback URL TextInput columns are clamped to a valid non-negative width on narrow terminals.
edgeCases: terminalColumns below 8 produces 0 input columns.
normal widths preserve existing width calculation.

requiredBehaviors: Local agent summary covers idle, starting, running, waiting-on-user, completing, failing, completed, and cancelled statuses when task records contain those states.
edgeCases: Completed local agents remain visible long enough for status summary.
Failed and killed agents use distinct labels.
Pending remains starting and running remains running.

requiredBehaviors: Teams dialog hide/show actions call the active backend and update hidden-pane state when the backend supports the operation.
edgeCases: Hide failure does not mutate hidden state.
Show failure does not mutate hidden state.
Missing pane id or missing backend returns without throwing.

requiredBehaviors: Waiting-on-user or awaiting-permission agent status renders distinctly from running and idle in transcript and spinner surfaces.
edgeCases: Waiting-on-user status text does not say running.
Awaiting permission/user aliases map to waiting-on-user wording.

requiredBehaviors: Supervisor subagent completion envelopes render as structured agent status messages instead of raw XML-like envelope text.
edgeCases: A well-formed subagent notification envelope is parsed.
Malformed envelope text still renders safely as assistant text.
Normal assistant messages are unchanged.

requiredBehaviors: Completion pipeline start events from scripts/goal/prep.mjs are persisted to .tmp/agenc-tui-completion-pipeline/events.jsonl and TUI renders the first gate as active while preserving transcript context.
edgeCases: Missing persisted pipeline file renders nothing.
Malformed persisted event is ignored without crashing.
A prep started event produces an active first gate line.

requiredBehaviors: Each running completion gate renders with current gate name, ordinal ordering from the nine-gate protocol, and prompt ownership state.
edgeCases: Unrecognized gate id uses a safe label.
Running gate replaces older active gate only when sequence order allows it.
The displayed ordinal matches the locked gateIds list.

requiredBehaviors: Succeeded completion gates persist in protocol order until the pipeline completes or clears.
edgeCases: Success before start is held until the matching start exists.
Pipeline complete keeps an audit summary but clears active prompt suppression.
Duplicate success events for the same sequence are deduped.

requiredBehaviors: Failed completion gates render the exact failing gate and detail as a first-class gate failure state.
edgeCases: Failure before start is held until the matching start exists.
Failure detail is bounded and does not replace unrelated generic errors.
A failed terminal state clears prompt ownership.

requiredBehaviors: Completion pipeline cancellation clears active gate ownership and renders a cancellation reason.
edgeCases: Cancellation while no active gate exists still renders safely.
Cancellation reason missing uses a default reason.
Cancelled terminal state clears prompt ownership.

requiredBehaviors: Completion pipeline gate events are ordered by sequence and gate index and hold out-of-order success or failure until the matching start exists.
edgeCases: Duplicate sequence events are deduped.
Success for a future gate waits until predecessor state exists.
Older events cannot regress a newer gate state.

requiredBehaviors: TUI boot reads the local .tmp/agenc-tui-completion-pipeline/events.jsonl pipeline event file directly through runtime/src/tui/completion-pipeline.ts and reconstructs current gate and prior results.
edgeCases: Missing file and unreadable file render no pipeline status.
Snapshot plus later events merge deterministically.
Old completed pipeline does not suppress prompt input on boot.

requiredBehaviors: Active completion gates suppress prompt input and unrelated keybinding focus through an explicit TUI gate ownership state.
edgeCases: Prompt is hidden while a gate is running.
Prompt returns after success, failure, cancellation, or completion.
Permissions and modal overlays retain higher-priority suppression.

requiredBehaviors: Confirm replStartupGates has no runtime TUI import references, then remove the orphan helper and its test-only coverage.
edgeCases: A repository scan finds no replStartupGates runtime import after deletion.
The prior test-only import is removed with the orphan helper.

requiredBehaviors: Confirm replInputSuppression has no runtime TUI import references, then remove the orphan helper and its test-only coverage.
edgeCases: A repository scan finds no replInputSuppression runtime import after deletion.
The prior test-only import is removed with the orphan helper.

requiredBehaviors: Remove disabled Settings Gates tab type/state/render branches or implement an active tab; this row removes the disabled legacy branch.
edgeCases: No defaultTab value can select Gates.
Esc handling no longer tracks an impossible Gates owner.

requiredBehaviors: Remove dead tmux/tungsten footer pill code that can never render.
edgeCases: Footer construction has no impossible tmux item.
Remaining footer items preserve ordering.

requiredBehaviors: Remove dead browser footer pill code that can never render.
edgeCases: Footer construction has no impossible browser item.
Remaining footer items preserve ordering.

requiredBehaviors: Remove disabled internal-only Help tab code and its impossible empty command collection.
edgeCases: Help tab index remains stable after removal.
No branch guarded by false remains.

requiredBehaviors: Remove moved-source markers and ts-nocheck headers from the active Ink render substrate files named by the audit row.
edgeCases: The files no longer start with ts-nocheck.
Runtime build and TUI validation still pass after marker removal.

requiredBehaviors: Remove moved-source markers and ts-nocheck headers from active overlay and modal context files named by the audit row.
edgeCases: The files no longer start with ts-nocheck.
Overlay/modal runtime behavior remains covered by TUI validation.

requiredBehaviors: Remove moved-source markers and ts-nocheck headers from active task, spinner, and team rendering files named by the audit row.
edgeCases: The files no longer start with ts-nocheck.
Spinner/team focused tests and TUI validation still pass after marker removal.

requiredBehaviors: Remove moved-source markers and ts-nocheck headers from active permission rendering files named by the audit row.
edgeCases: The files no longer start with ts-nocheck.
Permission focused tests and TUI validation still pass after marker removal.

requiredBehaviors: Replace deprecated TUI settings reads with current settings accessors in active boot/dialog surfaces.
edgeCases: Startup settings fallback still handles missing settings.
Dialog settings loads keep existing values.
No audited TUI file still imports getSettings_DEPRECATED.
commands: cd runtime && npm test -- src/tui/startup/StartupScreen.test.ts && ! rg -n "getSettings_DEPRECATED" src/tui/startup/StartupScreen.ts src/tui/hooks/useSettingsChange.ts src/tui/components/sandbox/SandboxSettings.tsx src/tui/components/MCPServerMultiselectDialog.tsx

requiredBehaviors: Remove deprecated command-source rendering branches from active Trust and Skills TUI surfaces.
edgeCases: Skills from current skill/plugin/MCP sources still render.
Deprecated command-source checks no longer appear in the audited TUI files.

requiredBehaviors: Replace donor-prefixed analytics/event identifiers in audited active TUI interaction paths with AgenC-owned names.
The final audit-status verifier is owned by this matrix and fails closed when any source row remains outside the accepted final state.
edgeCases: Prompt, provider, and MCP interactions still log events.
Audited files no longer contain donor-prefixed event names.
The verifier fails if any source audit row remains outside the accepted final state.
commands: cd runtime && npm test -- src/tui/components/ProviderManager.test.tsx && ! rg -n "tengu_" src/tui/components/PromptInput/PromptInput.tsx src/tui/components/ProviderManager.tsx src/tui/components/mcp/MCPRemoteServerMenu.tsx

completionPipelineProtocol.persistence: best-effort local JSONL under ignored .tmp/ project state; write failures must not mask the original goal-script result

snapshotFormat.detail: optional bounded failure or cancellation detail

orderingRules: sort accepted events by sequence, then gateIndex
dedupe events with the same pipelineId and sequence
hold succeeded, failed, or cancelled events until the same gate has a started event
older events cannot regress a newer terminal gate state
completed, failed, and cancelled clear prompt ownership
producerAssertions: prep.mjs emits started and succeeded or failed for the prep gate
verify.mjs emits started and succeeded or failed for branch_shape, branding, shape_evidence, item_specific, typecheck, and tui_validate
complete.mjs emits started and succeeded or failed for review and local_merge and emits completed for a successful pipeline
signal interruption or explicit abort emits cancelled when the producer can observe cancellation

finalValidationCommands: cd runtime && npm test -- src/tui/components/FullscreenLayout.test.tsx src/tui/components/PromptInput/utils.test.ts src/tui/components/PromptInput/PromptInputFooterLeftSide.test.tsx src/tui/components/mcp/MCPRemoteServerMenu.test.tsx src/tui/components/messages/UserToolResultMessage/UserToolResultMessage.test.tsx src/tui/components/permissions/PermissionRequest.test.tsx src/tui/components/spinner/agentActivity.test.ts src/tui/parity/session-transcript.test.ts src/tui/components/renderHealth.test.ts src/tui/components/App.local-agents.test.tsx src/tui/components/App.completion-pipeline.test.tsx src/tui/ink/components/App.render-error.test.tsx src/tui/ink/log-update.test.ts src/tui/components/teams/TeamsDialog.test.tsx src/tui/completion-pipeline.test.ts src/tui/components/HelpV2/HelpV2.test.tsx src/tui/components/Settings/Settings.test.tsx src/tui/components/TrustDialog/TrustDialog.test.tsx src/tui/components/skills/SkillsMenu.test.tsx src/tui/glyphs.test.ts src/tui/screens/orphan-rendering.test.ts src/tui/moved-source-markers.test.ts src/tui/startup/StartupScreen.test.ts src/tui/components/ProviderManager.test.tsx
